title: Minimalist Dark GUI
description: A pack that gives the GUI a simplistic dark mode look.
body:
A pack that gives the GUI a simplistic dark mode look.


This pack also supports ModMenu and adds dark mode texture to it's buttons


The dark mojang loading screen only works on Optifine


If you dont like the plain gray background, you can use my other pack with a night version of the default panorama. Check them out in my profile page.



This pack supports some mods with custom GUI Elements. If you want me to add support for another mod, feel free to leave a comment below.


List of supported mods:

- Inmis
- Trinkets (This includes all trinket mods that I know of, namely elytra trinkets, charm of undying, inmis,etc)
- ModMenu
- RP Renames
- Appleskin
- Inventory Profiles Next
- Just Enough Items (JEI)

Feel free to leave a comment if you want a mod to be supported by this pack.
